name: Mobile Navbar Layout Fix
description: Fix a responsive navbar bug (common frontend-agent rubric: fix mobile navbar without breaking desktop). File index.html has a header nav. On viewports <= 768px the menu should collapse behind a hamburger button id menu-toggle, and the link list id nav-links should be hidden by default then shown when body has class menu-open (toggle button toggles this class). Desktop (>768px) must show links in a horizontal row and hide the hamburger. Required: keep ids brand, menu-toggle, nav-links, and links Home/Product/Contact. Fix CSS/JS only as needed. When tests pass, FINISHED.
source: Inspired by frontend agent evals: fix mobile navbar layout (Frontman/DEV frontend coding agent rubrics).
